$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Date Picker (container) component
$description: Component tokens for Date Picker Mobile - the top-level date/time selection surface. Two types: Default (calendar with day grid, month/year navigation, quick-select chips, and Clear/Confirm actions) and Pin Wheel (scrolling date/time wheels). NESTED COMPONENTS: the day cells (Dates), the range connector (Gap), the month/year menu (Picker Menu), and the wheel columns (Pin Wheel Selector) each have their own token files, as do the Clear/Confirm buttons (button) and the quick-select chips (tag). This file defines only the container chrome - surface, header, navigation, weekday labels, grid spacing, and footer/chip layout. Figma Reference: Node ID 193-80528

$component.name: Date Picker Mobile
$component.description: A mobile date/time picker surface presented in a bottom sheet or modal. The Default type shows a calendar (title, month/year navigation, weekday header, day grid, quick-select chips, and Clear/Confirm actions). The Pin Wheel type shows scrolling date/time wheels. The Month & Year view swaps the grid for the Picker Menu.
$component.structure: Rounded, elevated container with 16px padding. Header row (title + close icon), month/year navigation row (double/single chevrons + label), weekday label row, day grid (Dates + Gap), quick-select chip row, and footer action row (Clear + Confirm). The Pin Wheel type replaces the grid with Pin Wheel Selector columns.

view.date-time: Pin Wheel date and time view

usage.contexts: Mobile date/time selection, range selection, scheduling
usage.features: Calendar grid, month/year navigation, quick-select presets, date/time wheels, Clear/Confirm actions
